Project kosmo-demo-001 Machine evidence incomplete Human review open Design generation blocked

IFC Human Review

Local review-only dashboard for semantic IFC evidence. It shows what Kosmo can prove automatically and what a human still has to decide before any IFC design seed is allowed.

IfcOpenShell Checks13/13

IFC Proxies2

Body/Brep2/2

Open Human Checks10

Decision Gate

Recommended current decisionkeep_needs_more_source_review

The viewer is evidence, not approval. Keep design generation blocked until the human checklist is complete and context-selection explicitly approves a seed.

Semantic Snapshot

Schema IFC4 Unit scale 1 Storeys 1 Geometry bboxes 2 Alignment missing_dxf_source Blender audit -

Machine Checks

ifc_source_existsIFC source exists: data/source-files/Bestand_Kontext.ifc.
source_mapping_not_seedIFC mapping decision is pending_review; suggested decision is needs_more_source_review.
design_generation_blockedContext selection does not approve design generation.
ifcopenshell_review_readyIfcOpenShell machine checks: 13/13.
ifcopenshell_units_meterIfcOpenShell unit scale: 1.
ifcopenshell_body_brep_ready2 Body/Brep proxy elements.
semantic_elements_present2 IFCBUILDINGELEMENTPROXY elements found.
semantic_integrity_fullSemantic integrity score is 1.
geometry_bboxes_resolved2 geometry bboxes resolved.
alignment_preview_readyAlignment hint: missing_dxf_source.
layer_plan_review_ready5 layer groups proposed.
blender_context_import_planned4 Blender context objects planned; status blender_context_import_pending_context_handoff.
blender_context_smoke_locked4/4 smoke objects locked.
blender_context_audit_passedAudit failures: 0.
no_blender_design_mesh_facesnot audited mesh faces found in audited context import.

Human Checklist

semantic_viewer_importOpen `data/source-files/Bestand_Kontext.ifc` in Bonsai/IfcOpenShell or equivalent and confirm the semantic tree loads without import errors.IfcOpenShell machine import passed 13/13; visual Bonsai-style tree review remains human.
element_class_reviewConfirm whether 2 IFCBUILDINGELEMENTPROXY objects are acceptable as semantic Bestand/context elements or need reclassification.2 IFCBUILDINGELEMENTPROXY elements found.
storey_reviewConfirm all 2 elements belong to IFCBUILDINGSTOREY #4 Level 0 and there are no missing/extra storeys.Container distribution: IFCBUILDINGSTOREY #4 Level 0: 2
placement_units_reviewConfirm object placements and project units match the expected meter-based project context.2 elements have object placement; geometry extents are 10 x 8 x 3.35 m.
origin_alignment_reviewCompare the semantic IFC import against DXF underlay, IFC bounds and LV95/project origin.Alignment hint: missing_dxf_source; center offset estimate 0 m.
geometry_outlier_reviewInspect large footprint/height outliers in the geometry preview before trusting the IFC as a design seed.12 faces resolved; inspect SVG preview and element samples.
property_set_reviewCheck `Pset_AtelierBlaupause_Object` fields such as OBJEKTART, DACH_MIN, DACH_MAX and gml_id for reliability.Property set distribution: Pset_KosmoDemo: 2
layer_mapping_reviewReview the generated Mass/material_unknown layer plan and decide whether finer wall/slab/roof/support classes are possible.5 generated layer groups; approved_for_import is false.
blender_reference_reviewOpen the audited Blender review blend and visually confirm it is only a locked reference underlay.Audit status null; mesh faces 0.
final_seed_decisionOnly after the checks above: decide keep as source review, accept as context, reject or approve as design seed.Recommended current decision remains keep_needs_more_source_review.

STEPNameClassOBJEKTARTContainerRepresentation
